LanguageData.VFEE_GreatHierarchy.description: This screen allows you to view all members of the Whitespring Enclave faction. You can spend Votes to invite them as visitors.
LanguageData.VFEE_GreatHierarchy.label: organizational chart
LanguageData.VFEE_Honors.description: This screen allows you to assign previously unlocked ranks to your colonists, providing them with unique but highly specific perks.
LanguageData.VFEE_Honors.label: commendations
LanguageData.VFEE_Permits.description: This screen allows you to customize and select permits for each of your commissioned officials.
LanguageData.VFEE_Vassalage.description: This screen allows you to contract nearby Whitespring bases to receive regular contributions from them.
LanguageData.VFEE_Vassalage.label: government contracts
